title: stelis flexuosa
intro: Stelis flexuosa, also known as the "flexible stelis," is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, belonging to the orchid family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Stelis flexuosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and boost the immune system. Stelis flexuosa is typically prepared as a tea or infused oil for herbal remedies, with the tea being used to treat coughs and respiratory issues, while the infused oil is used for skin and wound treatments.
